metadata.description: Average number of tokens per word

Ratio of unique tokens to total tokens (lexical diversity)
Average number of tokens per line of text
Bigram Entropy — frequency-weighted normalized Shannon entropy of right-accessor distributions
metadata.reference: Poelman et al. 2025, EMNLP (Shannon efficiency η)

metadata.description: Tokenizer Fairness Gini coefficient measures equitable treatment across languages
metadata.formula: TFG = Σᵢ Σⱼ |c_i - c_j| / (2 * n² * μ)
metadata.interpretation: Lower values indicate more equitable treatment (0 = perfect equality)

metadata.description: Lorenz curve data for visualizing tokenizer fairness
metadata.x_axis: Cumulative proportion of languages (sorted by efficiency)
metadata.y_axis: Cumulative proportion of total token cost

metadata.description: Fraction of content tokens whose bytes form complete UTF-8 characters, plus boundary-crossing token counts.
How many multi-byte UTF-8 characters have their bytes spread across multiple tokens.
